name: @leji-internal/sdk-py
description: npm workspace stub for the Python SDK; the real package metadata is pyproject.toml. Lets `npm test --workspaces` run the pytest suite. Never published to npm.

scripts.build: PY=$([ -x ./.venv/bin/python ] && echo ./.venv/bin/python || echo python3); "$PY" -m build --outdir dist
scripts.lint: PY=$([ -x ./.venv/bin/python ] && echo ./.venv/bin/python || echo python3); "$PY" -m ruff check . && "$PY" -m ruff format --check . && "$PY" -m mypy src
scripts.test: PY=$([ -x ./.venv/bin/python ] && echo ./.venv/bin/python || echo python3); npm run lint && "$PY" -m pytest -q
scripts.coverage: PY=$([ -x ./.venv/bin/python ] && echo ./.venv/bin/python || echo python3); "$PY" -m coverage run -m pytest -q && "$PY" -m coverage report
